roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Revoke Probation
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/X:DEFENDANT ENTERS PLEA AGAINST ADVISE OF PUBLIC DEFENDER//TWS/CH2:CJSS 1 Y:PROB  5 Y:PJ 120D/CTS:17/X:THIRD OFFENSE, DEFENDANT ADMITTED TO TWO PRIOR CONVICTIONS/PF525 12/MOP1/X:DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE A 18 MONTH ALCOHOL TREATMENT PROGRAM/LREG/IID:3/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:120/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/BKFEE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A)VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/VD:TRIAL DATE OF 09-28-12/

/CAL:PROOF OF SCRAM/SHER/BAIL:50,000/CTORD:IF DEFENDANT BAILS OUT, HE MUST OBTAIN A SCRAM BRACELET AND APPEAR IN COURT WITHIN 24 HOURS OF RELEASE/NTW/LD:10-09-12/VD:09-27-12 PRETRIAL DATE/CONTD:PRETRIAL AND TRIAL/DOP/
/TN:ABRAHAM HADDISU/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO OBTAIN A SCRAM BRACELET AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE/CONTD:PROOF OF SCRAM/DOP/
/CAL:APD MTR FILING/FTA/PROB ADM REV/BWI/BAIL:10,000/X:NOTICE TO APPEARBY APD IS ON FILE,/
/CAL:FILING OF APD MTR/CTORD:DEFENDANT RE-REFERRED TO THE ADULT PROBATIONDEPARTMENT/DEF:TO COMPLETE REUIREMENTS PREVIOUSLY LAID OUT BY THE APD/
/CAL:FINAL PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:002/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
